Package lu.kbra.pclib.db.utils.impl

Interface DataBaseEntryUtilsOptionsOwner

All Known Subinterfaces:
DataBaseEntryUtils, ProxyDataBaseEntryUtils
All Known Implementing Classes:
BaseDataBaseEntryUtils, BaseProxyDataBaseEntryUtils, MySQLDataBaseEntryUtils, PostgreSQLDataBaseEntryUtils, SpringDataBaseEntryUtils, SQLiteDataBaseEntryUtils
